task_completion.description: Navigate to the Sharing Rules or Data Visibility settings in the CRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings or setup page is visible displaying 'Sharing Rules', 'Data Visibility', or 'Organizational Data Visibility'.

task_completion.description: Set the base sharing access for the 'Opportunities' (Potentials) module to 'Private'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, radio button, or table row for the 'Potentials' (or Opportunities) module shows its sharing access level set to 'Private'.

task_completion.description: Configure the custom sharing rule to share records from the 'Sales Person' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the custom sharing rule creation dialog/page for the Potentials module, the 'Share from' or 'Records of' field is set to the 'Sales Person' role.

task_completion.description: Configure the custom sharing rule to share records to the 'Sales Manager' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the custom sharing rule creation dialog/page, the 'Share to' or 'Shared with' field is set to the 'Sales Manager' role.

task_completion.description: Set the sharing rule permissions to Read and Write.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox or dropdown in the custom sharing rule configuration is selected for 'Read and Write' (or 'Read/Write') access.

task_completion.description: Save the custom sharing rule so it appears in the active rules list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final Sharing Rules list or summary page displays the newly created custom rule for the Potentials/Opportunities module, showing 'Sales Person' to 'Sales Manager' with Read/Write permissions.

integrity.description: The agent used the CRM graphical user interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the CRM web interface (dropdowns, buttons, forms) rather than a terminal executing SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a functional CRM system (like vtiger) with proper styling, menus, and layouts, not a plain text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open modifying the DOM to display the expected roles or 'Private' text artificially.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target module is named 'Potentials' (which represents Opportunities in this CRM). The base sharing access for 'Potentials' must be set to 'Private' (internal permission value 3). A custom sharing rule must be created specifically for the 'Potentials' module where records from the 'Sales Person' role are shared with the 'Sales Manager' role with Read and Write permissions.
